intent: A planner turns the objective into an explicit, reviewable plan artifact (typed steps with preconditions and effect classes); the plan is approved as a whole; an executor runs it step-by-step, re-validating preconditions and returning to the planner on deviation.

state.plan: array of { step_id, action, tool_ref, effect_class, preconditions, expected_outcome }

nodes.role_ref: bound per instantiation to the acting profile

edges.when: all steps done OR replans exhausted

termination: all plan steps executed, or rejection at the gate, or replan budget exhausted (delivering completed steps + the deviation that stopped progress)
